name: Asparagus Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb. Swiss or Cheddar cheese (1/4 to 1/3 pound)
1/4 cup cold butter, cut into pieces (half a stick)
up to 3 tablespoons cold water or milk/buttermilk
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate or cube the cheese and place it on the bottom of an unbaked pie crust.
2. Chop and steam the asparagus, then spread over the cheese layer.
3. Sprinkle with a few sprigs dill weed and tarragon.
4. Beat together 3 eggs (or 4 if using a quiche pan), milk, and pour over the top.
5. Dust with paprika.
6. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes at 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Variations: Use sour cream or buttermilk instead of milk.
8. To make the crust: Cut together the butter, flour, salt, and water (or milk/buttermilk) until a dough forms. Roll out and shape to fit the pan.
